name: voxtral-dictation
title: Voxtral Dictation
description: Free, local, privacy-preserving speech-to-text dictation using Apple Silicon
author: YourRaycastUsername

commands.name: dictate
commands.title: Dictate
commands.subtitle: Voice to text
commands.description: Record audio and transcribe using local Voxtral model

preferences.name: binaryPath
preferences.title: Voxtral Binary Path
preferences.description: Full path to the voxtral binary

preferences.name: modelPath
preferences.title: Model Path
preferences.description: Path to the voxtral model directory

preferences.name: autoPaste
preferences.title: Auto-Paste
preferences.description: Automatically paste transcription to active app when done

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the `prepublishOnly` script and rerun `npm publish` again.

If you wanted to publish to the Raycast Store instead, use `npm run publish` instead.

" && exit 1
